# WantedForCode

WantedForCode is a senior software engineering consultancy based in Fuengirola, Spain.
We work directly with European and Latin American technology companies as embedded engineers — no middlemen, no account managers, no junior-heavy teams.

## What we do

- Custom Software Development: we design and build web applications, APIs, and platform integrations from the ground up
- Technical Leadership: CTO-as-a-service, architecture reviews, engineering team setup and mentoring
- Product Engineering: end-to-end product development from prototype to production
- Legacy Modernisation: migration of legacy systems to modern architectures, cloud-native refactoring
- Systems Integration: connecting third-party services, APIs, and data pipelines
- Applied AI Engineering: pragmatic AI feature integration into existing products

## How we work

We work in small, senior teams. Clients get direct access to the engineers building their product.
No sales process, no gatekeepers. We start with a brief and scope session, then design the solution, build iteratively, and provide ongoing support.

## Our work

- Multi-tenant accounting and ERP platform (SaaS)
- IoT device monitoring platform
- Pharma SaaS audit and modernisation
- Player-driven marketplace platform
- Water footprint calculator API
